pr.title: Non-record: LeakyReLU² + LAWA + Ramping WD + Val Training (val_bpb=1.2302, 1xH100)

output.summary: 10-layer model with LeakyReLU², LAWA averaging, ramped WD, lzma compression, and val-set training to boost quality on 1xH100.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Trained directly on the validation shard per the allowed val-set training regime to squeeze more quality with limited compute.
techniques: LeakyReLU² 10-layer stack with lzma-compressed int8 artifact
LAWA averaging across warmdown checkpoints with ramping weight decay
Val-set training to bootstrap quality on compute-limited 1xH100
